description: The essential quality of deserving trust through consistent integrity. Trustworthiness encompasses aligned words and actions, the safety others feel in your presence, earned faith through time, character proven in challenges.
rationale: The word 'pherani' combines aspirated 'phe' with radiant 'ra' and inward 'ni'. This three-syllable structure with fricative digraph captures trustworthiness as breath radiating inward truth.
